encoding_groups.name: BranchExchange
encoding_groups.comment: BX must be matched BEFORE Data Processing because its mask (0x0FFFFFF0) is more specific and overlaps the bits 27:25=000 + bit 4=1 region used by RegRegShift.

encoding_groups.name: PSRTransfer
encoding_groups.comment: PSR Transfer (MRS/MSR) overlaps with the Data Processing encoding space when opcode is 10xx and S=0. Listed before DataProcessing so priority lookup matches PSR encodings first.

formats.name: PSR_MSR_Imm
formats.comment: cccc 0011 0P10 ffff 1111 rrrr iiii iiii  (MSR PSR_<f>, #imm)

encoding_groups.name: DataProcessing
encoding_groups.comment: Three encoding variants (Immediate, RegImmShift, RegRegShift) share the same 16-opcode ALU table. Step lists are identical across variants — only the op2 operand resolution differs.

formats.name: DataProcessing_RegRegShift
formats.comment: cccc 000 oooo s nnnn dddd SSSS 0 tt 1 mmmm  (Rm shifted by Rs)

formats.name: DataProcessing_RegImmShift
formats.comment: cccc 000 oooo s nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (Rm shifted by 5-bit immediate)

formats.name: DataProcessing_Immediate
formats.comment: cccc 001 oooo s nnnn dddd rrrr iiiiiiii (8-bit imm rotated by 2*rrrr)

encoding_groups.name: SingleDataTransfer
encoding_groups.comment: ARM Single Data Transfer (LDR/STR + byte/word). Eight formats: (L,B) × {immediate offset, shifted-register offset}. P/U/W decoded at runtime via select / if.

formats.name: SDT_Reg_STR
formats.comment: cccc 011 P U 0 W 0 nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (STR Rd, [Rn ± Rm shift])

formats.name: SDT_Reg_LDR
formats.comment: cccc 011 P U 0 W 1 nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (LDR Rd, [Rn ± Rm shift])

formats.name: SDT_Reg_STRB
formats.comment: cccc 011 P U 1 W 0 nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (STRB Rd, [Rn ± Rm shift])

formats.name: SDT_Reg_LDRB
formats.comment: cccc 011 P U 1 W 1 nnnn dddd aaaaa tt 0 mmmm  (LDRB Rd, [Rn ± Rm shift])

formats.name: SDT_Imm_STR
formats.comment: cccc 010 P U 0 W 0 nnnn dddd iiiiiiiiiiii  (STR Rd, [Rn ± imm12])

formats.name: SDT_Imm_LDR
formats.comment: cccc 010 P U 0 W 1 nnnn dddd iiiiiiiiiiii  (LDR Rd, [Rn ± imm12])

formats.name: SDT_Imm_STRB
formats.comment: cccc 010 P U 1 W 0 nnnn dddd iiiiiiiiiiii  (STRB Rd, [Rn ± imm12])

formats.name: SDT_Imm_LDRB
formats.comment: cccc 010 P U 1 W 1 nnnn dddd iiiiiiiiiiii  (LDRB Rd, [Rn ± imm12])
